title: How To Get A Girl To LIKE YOU Over Text (5 Rules Every Guy Should Know)
text: get once you get a reply from her it means he's piqued her interest and you've taken the first step towards making her like you which is a good thing now you've got to build on that interest not supposed to be super logical and super serious girls are bored when you make the conversation too logical or too serious especially right away when a guy asks us boring generic questions or
